# Skill: AI-Generated Comment Guideline

Always include the exact text below when creating new code artifacts:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

Rules:
- Add this exact comment near the top of every newly created file.
- Add this exact comment in or directly above every newly created class definition.
- Do not alter casing, spacing, or wording.
